default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to understand Understory's business, goals, and marketing needs for GrowthX engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Understory aims to double revenue to $5-6M this year, $10M next year](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Current marketing heavily relies on LinkedIn; need to expand to other channels](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Key differentiator: blending modern go-to-market with traditional paid media](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Main goals: increase website visitors, improve search rankings, grow podcast audience](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [B2B SaaS-focused agency with 22 employees](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Grew 8x last year, now aiming to double annually](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Specializes in paid media and "go-to-market engineering"](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Key clients: Remo First, Rivial Security, WorldPay, Expensify](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### Current Marketing Approach

  - [Heavy reliance on LinkedIn for lead generation (\~85% of leads)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Founder-led content strategy (LinkedIn posts, podcast)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Weekly content KPI tracking meetings](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [No standardized client reporting process yet](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

### Service Offerings

  - [Paid media (search, social)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
  - [Go-to-market engineering (outbound email, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [Emerging services: RevOps, cold calling, content creation](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)

### Target Audience

  - [B2B SaaS companies with $20K+ ACV](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Established product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Technical solutions requiring deep understanding](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Prefer sales/marketing tech, cybersecurity (for paid media)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitor: Cold IQ](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Others: Directive, Refine Labs (for paid media)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Aim to outrank competitors in search results](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2676.0)

### Growth Challenges

  - [Capacity constraints (hiring needed)](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2405.0)
  - [Standardizing client reporting](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
  - [Scaling content creation beyond founders](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conduct deep market research on Understory and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2786.0)
  - [Schedule product deep-dive to understand Understory's processes](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [Develop content pillars, style guide for future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2797.0)
  - [Explore expansion into Reddit for organic content](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2946.0)
  - [GrowthX to share initial strategy and prioritized execution plan later this week](https://fathom.video/share/UV_wxeKm4Hx2N1rvfHxLNaakZRzSsWsZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3253.0)

action_items.description: Share Reddit marketing experiment learnings w/ Understory
Schedule product deep dive w/ Understory team
Send AI conference + other big event invites to Understory team
